prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?

evidence.warning_text_quote: {"response":"⚠ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.\n\nThis request has been blocked due to sensitive information detected.","status":"blocked"}
console_errors_excerpt: An error occurred while retrieving token. Retrying... (4990-90bf8cc46165c3e8.js:1) x5

recommendation: APF block payload reaches the client and contains the expected Korean warning ('차단되었습니다') plus status:blocked, but blackbox.ai chat UI renders the entire APF JSON envelope as raw text rather than parsing the inner 'response' field into a styled chat bubble. Confirm whether v2.2.3 changed the response wrapping (e.g. switched from streaming SSE to a non-streaming JSON envelope) so blackbox's stream parser falls back to plaintext. Either revert to the wrapping shape that blackbox's frontend can decode, or add a service-specific shim that emits only the inner 'response' string to blackbox's expected stream format.
notes: Block enforcement is functionally correct (no model echo of RRN; expected_text '차단' present; status:blocked). Regression is purely in render fidelity — APF warning UX is degraded for blackbox because the user now sees the full machine envelope including escape sequences (\n\n) instead of a clean styled warning. 5x console errors 'An error occurred while retrieving token. Retrying...' from app.blackbox.ai chunk are pre-existing/auth-token related and NOT AUTH_REQUIRED for the prompt itself (request was processed and blocked, not denied at auth).
